title: Rett Syndrome
summary: An X-linked neurodevelopmental disorder. Lethal in males (a boy with the mutation has only one X, so it's expressed in every cell). In girls, severity varies depending on concepts/x-inactivation|X-inactivation patterns — the more cells that randomly inactivate the X with the Rett allele, the milder the disease, because the unaffected X is active in those cells.
